description: You are a quantitative analyst evaluating a new Moving Average Crossover strategy. The junior quant's backtester in /home/ga/workspace/quant_backtester/backtest_engine.py is outputting impossible returns due to four critical logical errors causing lookahead bias and incorrect risk calculations. Audit the engine and fix the signal lookahead bias by ensuring today's positions capture tomorrow's returns, correct the transaction cost logic to apply costs only on position changes, eliminate future leakage in data imputation by using forward-filling instead of global means, and fix the drawdown calculation to use rolling peaks instead of the absolute global maximum. Verify your implementation by running python run_backtest.py.
